title: page_chunks.json -- retrievable text chunks v0.1
description: Chunked redacted text for a case's documents, consumed by later stages that need chunk-level access instead of full-document text (denial-validation's retrieval sub-phase, screening-report). Produced by document-pipeline's checkpoint 3. At PoC scale this is direct chunking, not vector-indexed -- see the Step 3 indexing adapter in pipeline.md, which stays a no-op unless real indexing is enabled.

text.description: The chunk's redacted text, verbatim from redacted_text.md -- not re-summarized.
